headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Williams-Sonoma, Raises Price Target to $250
summary: Keybanc  analyst Bradley Thomas   maintains Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $230 to $250.

headline: Mid-Year 2026 U.S. Retail/Restaurant Outlook
